Skill Path: Favors

You know how to charm people into doing whatever you ask of them.

While developing your skills in Diplomacy you chose to focus specifically on Favors, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5nc5ridFBfYpn2Om]{Bargain Hunter}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.muMOxZyduEFv8UT6]{A Home in Every Port}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5nc5ridFBfYpn2Om]{Bargain Hunter}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.muMOxZyduEFv8UT6]{A Home in Every Port}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bmtf49jRKBCfdC5W]{Half-Truths}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KIK2Eza9TK47MEb2]{Shameless Request}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.A0TNeMNvyY8QpmLz]{Legendary Negotiation}
